---
title: "Intro to R 2026"
format: html
author: "FRIEDMAI"
date: 2026-03-18
editor: visual
---

##Intro

```{r}
3
4
5
typeof(9000)
```


```{r}
"text goes in quotes"
typeof("strings")
```

```{r}
a <- c(1,2,3)
a
c(1, "two", 3)
typeof(1)
```

```{r}
my_list <- list(number = c(1,2,3), words = c("one","two"))
                str(my_list)
```
```{r}
#| label: setup
source("training_source.R")
```

```{r}
csv_path <- "../data/raw/presurvey_20260317.csv"
survey_raw <- rio::import(csv_path)
```
